loci.statement: The Cold Storage line is the high-margin part of the business.
The business currently operates three trucks across the metro area.
Each truck is staffed with one driver and one technician on long routes.
In the last quarter, the business lost two shipments due to coolant mismatch, which cost the business roughly $4,800 in claims.

The standard workflow includes a customer calling in, dispatch logging the pickup, the driver collecting, the technician verifying temperature on arrival, the business delivering, and the customer signing for it.
For dry ice loads, the business always uses the VIP panel inserts.
VIP panel inserts cost more up front, but their failure rate is essentially zero.
Gel pack loads are cheaper but are only safe for transit times under 18 hours.
For transit times longer than 18 hours, dry ice should be used.
The Sophia Key 3M tool can model a lane and tell the business in advance which configuration will hold.
